response: Both Lancaster Cathedral and Peel Cathedral belong to the Catholic religion. Lancaster Cathedral is a Roman Catholic cathedral located in Lancaster, England, and is part of the Roman Catholic Diocese of Lancaster. Peel Cathedral is located on the Isle of Man and is also a Roman Catholic cathedral, part of the Catholic Archdiocese of Sodor and Man. Both cathedrals are affiliated with the Catholic Church and serve as parish churches or cathedrals within their respective jurisdictions.
